en: I wanted to share this little story with you.
I got into a little bit of trouble
ko: 저는 프랑스 정부와 약간의 문제에 휘말렸어요.
그래서 무슨 일이 있었냐면, 처음부터 시작해볼게요. 프랑스가 월드컵에서 우승했어요.

en: So what happened was, let's start at the beginning. France won the World Cup.
And so on the show, we celebrated that.
And I had this joke where I said,
ko: 제가 말했죠, 아프리카가 월드컵에서 우승했다고. 맞죠?

en: I said, Africa won the World Cup. Right? Yeah.
ko: 그리고 많은 프랑스 사람들이 얼마나 화가 났는지 정말 놀랐어요.

en: And I was shocked at how angry a lot of French people got.
ko: 진짜로, 많은 프랑스 사람들이 화가 나서

en: Like, genuinely, a lot of French people were angry
ko: "트레버, 어떻게 그런 말을 할 수 있어?"라고 하더라고요.

en: and they were like, oh, Trevor, how can you say this?
ko: "왜 이런 말을 하냐?"고요. 정말 끔찍하다고. 저는 "알겠어요"라고 했어요.

en: Why would you say these things, you know? This is horrible. And I was like, okay, I get it.
ko: 모든 사람이 당신이 하는 농담을 좋아하는 건 아니니까요,

en: Not everyone likes every joke that you tell,
and I get that, but this was interesting.
I got a letter from the ambassador,
